title: Testimonials & Use Cases
subtitle: Organizations use Sipremo to turn climate data into strategic decisions, reducing risks and increasing operational efficiency.

jefferson-depaula.name: Jefferson de Paula
jefferson-depaula.text: Sipremo, the startup using AI to monitor our forests, helped reduce our operational costs by 40%.

filipe-ferreira.name: Filipe Ferreira
filipe-ferreira.text: The speed and accuracy of alerts are crucial for enabling proactive, strategic action during dam safety crises.

saltica.title: Sipremo & Saltica Partnership
saltica.desc: Sipremo and Saltica announce a partnership to turn climate risk into strategic intelligence, combining AI climate models with financial risk analysis.

spacemetriks.title: Sipremo & Spacemetriks Partnership
spacemetriks.desc: Integration of sensors, IoT, drones, and environmental data with climate AI models for real-time field data and predictive analytics.

insurance-aware.title: InsuranceAware™
insurance-aware.desc: Advanced predictive analytics for insurance and reinsurance, using AI to forecast environmental risks 1–12 months ahead, including extreme events.

supply-chain.title: Resilient supply chains
supply-chain.desc: Sipremo helps companies avoid operational disruptions with advanced climate forecasts, enabling more efficient planning in critical sectors.

public-health.title: Public health and climate
public-health.desc: The platform supports health systems in anticipating climate risks that affect communities, strengthening resilience and prevention.

smart-city.title: SmartCityWatch™
smart-city.desc: Forecasting technology for smart cities, anticipating floods, heat waves, and storms months in advance.
